reason: Strict CSV rules shipped as misuse-resistant builder plus exit-check validator script, not just prose.
Basic sort/dedup/group Python idioms a capable agent already knows without any skill loaded.
Ordering constraints causally justified, done_when checklist, explicit human/second-context sign-off separation.
Demands 3 drafts, a 15-cell scoring matrix, double link audit for a one-line edit.
Concrete org taxonomy, exit checklist, and explicit human seam for severity/naming calls.
No real header name, money format, or error schema given; agent must still guess.
Concrete hex/spacing/type values with fences and a value-by-value exit comparison against the tables.
Machine-critical field order given only as prose warnings, no builder or validator script provided.
Imposes a rigid 5-step drafting order with no real dependency justification between the steps.
Concrete good/bad examples, actionable fences, and a per-message exit check against them.
Standard meeting-minutes shape a competent agent already produces; no non-obvious org-specific machine-critical facts.
Machine-consumed category order justified, concrete fences, and an explicit exit checklist before done.
